overall.description: A character traverses a desolate, rain-soaked landscape at twilight in this cinematic game footage from Death Stranding. The journey progresses from open grasslands across a river and onto rocky terrain, with dramatic mountain backdrops and mysterious vertical light beams piercing the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountains and vertical light beams

events.description: on-screen notification 'The sun has risen' appears, indicating transition to dawn with gradually increasing ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rain-soaked grassland toward distant mountains, carrying large illuminated backpack

entered.detail: tall vertical columns of white light piercing through the storm clouds
jagged mountain silhouettes against the dark blue sky
distant dilapidated building with faint blue illumination
dark wet grass and soil stretching toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a desolate grassland at twilight during a light rain. Vertical light beams pierce the stormy sky above jagged distant mountains, while a ruined structure glows faintly on the left horizon. The ambient light gradually increases as the sun rises.

events.description: character enters the river, transitioning from dry land to water
character transitions from wading to swimming as water depth increases, camera partially submerges

agents.ego_description: wading through river current then swimming across, water splashing around the character and backpack

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current and splashes around the character
large rock formation visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character enters a flowing river and swims across, with water splashing around the illuminated backpack. The camera partially submerges during the crossing, showing the current and distant rocky outcrops while the grassy plains disappear behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky badlands with layered stone formations

events.description: character exits river onto rocky shoreline
character climbs up vertical rock face to higher elevation

agents.ego_description: climbing out of river onto rocky terrain and traversing the stone landscape toward distant peaks

entered.detail: dark wet rocks and gravel forming the riverbank and plateau
vertical layered rock face that the character climbs
patches of pinkish sand or sediment visible between rocks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the river, the character climbs a stone cliff wall and traverses the rocky badlands. The terrain features layered rock formations and patches of pink sediment, with the distant mountain range now centered ahead as the journey continues across the desolate landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate landscape that transforms from rain-soaked grasslands into a rugged, rocky highland. It begins with the character walking through twilight plains under a stormy sky pierced by vertical light beams, while a ruined structure glows faintly on the horizon as the ambient light gradually increases. As the character reaches a flowing river, the camera partially submerges to capture the splashing water and the current, leaving the grassy plains behind in favor of distant rocky outcrops. The scene then shifts as the character emerges from the water to climb a stone cliff wall, transitioning into a traverse across rocky badlands characterized by layered formations and pink sediment. Finally, the camera centers on the distant mountain range as the journey continues across the desolate, stony terrain.
